content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changes from the base commit (f2fc08b4) through HEAD across 7 source files. The implementation adds milestone next/run commands with active milestone selection, extracts shared bead_refs module, redirects tracing to stderr, and includes comprehensive CLI integration tests. Build passes clean: 792 tests pass, clippy with -D warnings clean, fmt clean. Key findings: (1) The canonicalize_milestone_bead_ref change from the old version correctly prevents re-prefixing foreign-qualified bead IDs. (2) The br_show_output_indicates_missing narrowing fixes a false-positive bug where 'permission issue: path not found' would have been misidentified as a missing bead. (3) The execute_milestone_run loop has a proper MAX_MILESTONE_RUN_STEPS=256 guard against infinite loops. (4) Active milestone fallback chain (explicit pointer → active project's milestone) is robust with stale pointer recovery. (5) Controller state machine transitions are properly handled with exhaustive match arms. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
